title: euphorbia serpillifolia subsp. serpillifolia
intro: Euphorbia serpillifolia subsp. serpillifolia is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family, Euphorbiaceae. It is a perennial herb with a creeping habit, producing small yellow flowers in clusters. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and it has been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
